safety_constraints: do not publish private raw source exports
access_path: GitHub repository and Pages workflow logs
appeal_path: open a repository issue or request maintainer review
expiry_or_revisit: revisit on next major release profile
challenged_party_independence: records are preserved in git and GitHub workflow logs rather than only in the challenged runtime
preservation_rule: future publication changes must keep validation and changelog records
preservation_obligation: retain public validation and changelog artifacts across release profiles
non_claims: fixture does not prove institutional auditability
fixture does not prove exit or fork path availability
